economic_notes: Musqueam has significant real estate and marine government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. MST Development Corporation is a proportionately consolidated government partnership with 1/3 shared control. Real estate GBE gain: $2,973,293; Marine GBE gain: $559,382. Complex consolidation with dozens of numbered companies, LPs, and joint ventures.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 — this is fiscal year 2023, not 2024. Very complex consolidation: 37+ fully consolidated subsidiaries including numbered BCs, LPs, and societies; 47+ GBEs accounted for by modified equity method including real estate and marine joint ventures at 25%-33.33% interests. MST Development Corporation and MST Employment & Training Society proportionately consolidated at 1/3 interest. Ottawa Trust Funds of $5,493,079 included in cash resources. Balance sheet detail (accounts receivable, current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, TCA) not fully extracted from the truncated text provided. Net financial assets of $203,977,060 confirmed from Statement of Changes in Net Financial Assets. Annual debt service = CMHC repayment $477,298 + capital lease principal $134,201 = $611,499.
